mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, password_hash, role, failed_attempts, lockout_until, active) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{failedAttempts}, #{lockoutUntil}, #{active})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, failed_attempts, lockout_until, active FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password_hash, role, failed_attempts, lockout_until, active FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET failed_attempts = #{failedAttempts}, lockout_until = #{lockoutUntil} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_account SET failed_attempts = 0, lockout_until = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
